title: Duplicate item or question in Workform
excerpt: Is it possible to duplicate an item or question within the form in Workforms?

posts.author: hubdobem (hub do bem)
posts.cookedHtml: Is it possible to duplicate an item or question within the form in Workforms?

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @hubdobem! This is not possible at this time but it’s a great suggestion for our product team! Thanks for bringing it to our attention!

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
